recommendations: Use PyMuPDF native-text extraction as a zero-token fastlane before OCR for born-digital PDFs.
Use Docling OCR as the main free scanned-page layer before any Gemini fallback.
Keep a measured table-structure Docling variant available for tabular pages before spending Gemini tokens.
